channel.title: CS-108 Object-Oriented Programming II :: CS Two Year Refactor
channel.description: CS-108 — Object-Oriented Programming II 1 credit Working description Collections, iterators, OOP design principles — abstraction over data access/traversal; modeling discipline. To develop Learning outcomes / competencies evidenced Week-by-week map (8 weeks) Signature/embedded assessments Threads passing through (with pass depth) Prerequisites and standalone-extractability (for service use)
